Uses of Package
com.societegenerale.failover.properties

Packages that use com.societegenerale.failover.properties
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.properties
Configuration properties bound under the failover.* prefix.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.properties used by com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
    Class
    Description
    FailoverProperties
    Root configuration properties for the failover framework, bound to the failover prefix.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.properties used by com.societegenerale.failover.properties
    Class
    Description
    ExceptionPolicy
    Strategy that governs how the failover framework handles exceptions thrown by the primary method when recovery is unavailable or the stored entry has expired.
    FailoverType
    This describes the type of failover
    MultiTenant.JdbcMultiTenantStrategy
    Tenant isolation strategy for the JDBC store.
    StoreType
